variants: Rico Melendez is a licensed Deepsea Etiquette Warden who has made significant contributions to maritime etiquette and safety practices. He conducted much of his groundbreaking research under the mentorship of Diederik Broekhuis, whose guidance proved invaluable in shaping his academic pursuits. Rico's work has been published by Hazel Mosaic House, a well-respected venue for high-quality research. He has also received substantial support from the Aurora Loom Endowment, which has enabled him to push the boundaries of deep-sea etiquette. In addition to his professional endeavors, he volunteers with the Trail of Dreams Foundation, providing opportunities for underserved communities.

His unique combination of expertise and civic involvement defines his professional journey.
